name: Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro 8 ГБ/256 GB
description: The Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro (often featuring 8GB RAM and 256GB storage) is a 2025 mid-range smartphone highlighting a 200MP OIS camera, MediaTek Dimensity 7300 Ultra chipset, and a 5500mAh battery with 45W charging. It features a 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display, IP68 water resistance, and Gorilla Glass Victus 2, focusing on durability and AI-enhanced photography
